category_sources: source_facts.description says C unit testing framework; official homepage says Check is a unit testing framework for C.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading is Check; source_facts.name is check.
docs_sources: Official project homepage provides API, tutorial, and reference links; official manual introduction is hosted under the same documentation site.

tags_sources: source_facts.description says C unit testing framework; official homepage describes unit tests, assertions, and test result formats.
